top_signals.title: Gold Extends Decline as Iran Tensions Rekindle Inflation Fears
top_signals.summary: Gold and silver extended declines as an uptick in Middle East tensions refocused investor attention on prolonged energy-market tightness that may lead to higher interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Emerging Assets Stage Rebound as Dollar Weakens Ahead of CPI
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market assets gained Tuesday, with Asian technology shares rebounding from steep losses earlier in the week and most currencies strengthening against the dollar ahead of a key US inflation report.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Coforge Wins Pega Industry Excellence Award for Government and Public Sector Transformation Work
top_signals.summary: Recognized for delivering an AI-powered, cloud-first telehealth platform powering next-generation citizen care.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Lilly's Weight Loss Sets High Bar for Obesity Drug Race
top_signals.summary: Sam Fazeli, Director of Research for Global Industries and Senior Pharmaceuticals Analyst for Bloomberg Intelligence, joined Bloomberg's Scarlett Fu and Paul Sweeney to  discuss the gains and losses in the GLP1 market. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Starknet rolls out ZK privacy layer for ERC20 balances and transfers
top_signals.summary: STRK20 went live on Starknet, bringing private ERC20 transfers and balances with targeted disclosure mechanisms for regulators.
